trigger_condition: If NVDA breaks below 204, reduce 5 NVDA. If NVDA breaks below 200, reduce another 5 NVDA.
next_action: Hold without adding while below the 210-212 reclaim zone.
intended_action: NVDA remains the main core-risk watch; preserve 204/200 downside protection.

review_conclusion: Hold state remains active between the reclaim and protection zones.
